response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates a strong background in backend development, distributed systems, and event-driven architectures, with notable experience in real-time systems and high-performance applications. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of experience with multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management), or scaling engineering teams in regulated environments. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq is promising but not sufficiently detailed to confirm production-grade expertise in agentic AI or fintech-specific applications.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed-systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and microservices
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and improving software development processes
Diverse technical stack experience, including real-time systems and high-performance databases
concerns: No explicit experience with multi-agent AI systems or agentic frameworks in production
Limited evidence of fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, or regulatory compliance)
Lack of demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people or managing external delivery partners
